    AI Website Builder

    AI Website Builder

    Create your website faster than ever

    Build a website with AI from a single prompt and get a beautifully designed site ready to publish

    Not sure where to start? Try one of these:

    Base44 gives you everything you need for your free AI website

    Create your website

    Build a complete website

    The AI website builder goes beyond basic website creation. Base44 intelligently builds pages and workflows around your ideas, so you’re launching a real, scalable site from day one.

    Built-in backend

    Base44 includes everything your site needs to run, including user authentication, data storage and role-based permissions. Your backend is fully connected and ready behind the scenes.

    Hosting and domain extension included

    Launch instantly with built-in free website hosting and a free Base44 domain extension. The AI website maker gives you everything you need to publish and grow your site without managing infrastructure.

    Security at the core of your website

    Every site built with Base44’s AI website creator includes integrated security scanning that detects vulnerabilities early. You can confidently create a website knowing protection is built into the foundation.

    How to create a website with AI

    Follow these simple steps to create an AI-built website.

    Create your website

    01

    Describe your idea.

    Type a prompt describing what you want to build or select a ready-made option to kick things off.

    02

    Generate a free website.

    The AI website generator creates a complete site with structure and layout quickly and effortlessly.

    03

    Make it yours.

    Customize design, refine logic and add features as your AI-built website continues to take form.

    04

    Connect integrations.

    Link your website to the tools you already use like forms, email, payments and databases with one-click connectors.

    05

    Launch and share.

    When it’s ready, publish your website. Use it yourself, share it with others and continue improving it over time.

    Build with peace of mind, keep your website secure

    Security and governance are built-in to Base44’s AI website creation, so your site stays private, compliant and easy to manage at any scale.

    Create your website

    SSO for secure access

    Connect your identity provider to your website and onboard entire teams with confidence. Enable secure login, simplify authentication and give your organization instant, controlled access.

    Private deployments to protect your ideas

    Base44’s AI website builder offers a secure environment where only approved collaborators can view and test it. Keep prototypes private while you iterate, then publish when you’re ready.

    Built-in security checks

    Every site created with Base44’s AI website creator includes an integrated Security Scanner that detects common vulnerabilities early, serving as your first line of defense.

    Smart access controls

    Manage permissions as you create a website, assign roles and automate provisioning with SCIM. Control who can view, edit or deploy, while keeping workflows efficient and secure.

    Power your website with built-in integrations and one-click connectors

    Integrate Base44 with the tools you use every day to improve your AI website.  Sync data seamlessly, automate tasks and streamline your workflows.

    AI website builder FAQs

    How does an AI website builder work?

    An AI website builder uses artificial intelligence to automatically generate a website based on your inputs. Instead of designing pages manually, you simply describe your business, goals or the type of site you want to create. The AI analyzes your request and instantly generates layouts, copy, images and structure tailored to your needs.


    With Base44’s AI website builder, you can go from idea to live site in minutes. The system handles design, content generation and optimization, while still allowing you to customize colors, branding, and layout afterward.

    How much does an AI generated website cost?

    The cost of an AI generated website depends on the platform and features you choose. Many platforms offer free plans with basic functionality, while premium plans typically range from affordable monthly subscriptions to higher-tier business packages.


    Base44 has a free plan and also provides flexible pricing options, so you can start small and upgrade as your needs grow. Compared to hiring a developer or agency, using an AI website generator significantly reduces both upfront costs and ongoing maintenance expenses.

    What are the benefits of using an AI website maker?

    Using an AI website maker offers several key benefits:


    • Speed: Launch a site in minutes instead of weeks.

    • Ease of use: No coding or design experience required.

    • Cost efficiency: Lower costs than traditional web development.

    • Smart content generation: Automatically generated copy and layouts.

    • Built-in optimization: Many AI website makers include SEO and mobile optimization features.


    Base44’s AI website maker combines automation with flexibility, so you can quickly create a professional site while still maintaining control over your brand and messaging.

    Is the AI website builder free to use?

    Many AI website builder platforms offer a free version or trial so users can test the experience before committing to a paid plan. Free plans include hosting and limited customization.


    Base44 offers a free plan to get you started. See our plans here.

    How can I vibe code a website?

    “Vibe coding” a website means describing the feeling, style or aesthetic you want, and letting AI bring it to life. Instead of writing code, you communicate your vision in natural language.


    With an AI website builder like Base44, you can say things like:


    • “Create a minimalist, modern portfolio with bold typography.”

    • “Build a playful eCommerce site for a handmade jewelry brand.”

    • “Design a sleek SaaS landing page with a dark theme.”


    The AI website builder interprets your vibe and generates a matching design, layout and content structure. You can then tweak and refine until it perfectly matches your brand.

    How to choose the best AI website builder?

    When choosing the best AI website builder, consider:


    1. Ease of use – Is the interface intuitive?

    2. Customization options – Can you adjust layouts, branding, and content?

    3. SEO capabilities – Does the AI website builder support metadata, structured content, and performance optimization?

    4. Scalability – Can it grow with your business?

    5. Pricing flexibility – Does it fit your budget?


    Base44’s AI website builder is designed for speed, flexibility, and scalability, making it suitable for creators, startups, and businesses looking to launch quickly without sacrificing quality.

    Will my AI website be mobile-friendly?

    Yes. A modern AI website builder automatically creates responsive websites that adapt to different screen sizes. This ensures your site looks and functions well on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.


    Base44’s AI website builder generates mobile-friendly layouts by default, optimizing spacing, typography, and navigation for a seamless user experience across all devices.

    What types of websites can you build with AI?

    An AI website builder can create a wide variety of websites, including:


    • Business websites

    • Landing pages

    • eCommerce stores

    • Portfolios

    • Blogs

    • SaaS product sites

    • Event pages

    • Personal brand websites


    Base44’s AI website builder adapts to different industries and use cases, allowing you to generate both simple sites and more advanced, app-like web experiences.

    How can I optimize my generated AI website for SEO?

    To optimize your site created with an AI website builder, follow these best practices:


    • Add clear, keyword-focused page titles and meta descriptions

    • Use structured headings (H1, H2, H3)

    • Optimize images with descriptive alt text

    • Improve page speed and performance

    • Publish high-quality, relevant content

    • Connect your site to analytics and search tools


    Base44’s AI website builder gives you control over SEO settings, making it easy to refine metadata, URLs, and content so your site ranks higher in search results and attracts organic traffic.

    So, what are we building?

    Create your website

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
